title: DomainEvidenceConfig
description: Registers domain-specific evidence subtypes that refine the five abstract categories. Loaded at Governance server startup. Architecture Document Section 3.3.3.

category.description: Abstract category this subtype belongs to.

required_fields.description: Fields that must be present in evidence_refs of this subtype (beyond the common fields: type, category, source, content, confidence).

validation_function.description: Name of a registered Python validation function that checks source validity and domain-specific constraints for this subtype. Must be deterministic and side-effect-free.
